files.patch:
@@ -109,6 +109,7 @@ on:
         default: "false"
   schedule:
     - cron: "*/5 * * * *"
+    # ClawHub schedules stay opt-in until the ClawSweeper app is installed there.
     - cron: "2/5 * * * *"
     - cron: "7 */6 * * *"
     - cron: "12 */6 * * *"
@@ -333,7 +334,7 @@ jobs:
 
   plan:
     name: Plan review candidates
-    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'repository_dispatch' && !((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && (github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true' || github.event.inputs.audit_dashboard == 'true')) || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && ((github.event.schedule == '3 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '18 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '33 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '48 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '8,23,38,53 * * * *') || (github.event.schedule == '7 */6 * * *' || github.event.schedule == '12 */6 * * *')))) }}
+    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'repository_dispatch' && !((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && (github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true' || github.event.inputs.audit_dashboard == 'true')) || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && ((github.event.schedule == '3 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '18 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '33 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '48 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '8,23,38,53 * * * *') || (github.event.schedule == '7 */6 * * *' || github.event.schedule == '12 */6 * * *')))) && !(github.event_name == 'schedule' && (github.event.schedule == '2/5 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '22 * * * *') && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1') }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 30
     outputs:
@@ -758,7 +759,7 @@ jobs:
 
   audit-dashboard:
     name: Audit dashboard
-    if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.audit_dashboard == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && (github.event.schedule == '7 */6 * * *' || github.event.schedule == '12 */6 * * *')) }}
+    if: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.audit_dashboard == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && (github.event.schedule == '7 */6 * * *' || github.event.schedule == '12 */6 * * *'))) && !(github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '12 */6 * * *' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1') }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 45
     steps:
@@ -826,7 +827,7 @@ jobs:
 
   apply-existing:
     name: Apply close proposals
-    if: ${{ (github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && (github.event.schedule == '3 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '18 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '33 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '48 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '8,23,38,53 * * * *')) }}
+    if: ${{ ((github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && github.event.inputs.apply_existing == 'true') || (github.event_name == 'schedule' && (github.event.schedule == '3 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '18 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '33 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '48 * * * *' || github.event.schedule == '8,23,38,53 * * * *'))) && !(github.event_name == 'schedule' && github.event.schedule == '8,23,38,53 * * * *' && vars.CLAWSWEEPER_ENABLE_CLAWHUB != '1') }}
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     timeout-minutes: 360
     steps:
